Document:
# Combat System Reference
Quick reference for the combat systems in OpenEdge 14.
## Damage Flow
Player attacks | MeleeWeapon component calculates base damage | STR modifier applied | DamageEvent raised | HealthSystem applies damage | StatusEffectSystem applies effects (bleeding, etc.)
## Key Components
[bold]MeleeWeapon[/bold] — defines weapon damage and attack speed. DEX stat affects attack delay.
[bold]OE14Skills[/bold] — combat skill trees that grant damage bonuses and special attacks.
## Stat Effects on Combat
- [bold]STR[/bold] — increases melee damage - [bold]DEX[/bold] — decreases attack delay (faster attacks) - [bold]VIT[/bold] — increases max health (survivability)
## File Locations
- [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/Combat/[/mono] - [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Combat/[/mono]
## Content Under Construction
Full combat system reference coming soon.
